evals.prompt: Give me today's AI and agentic knowledge digest — fetch from the usual sources and generate the interactive HTML page. Focus on RAG, knowledge graphs, agent memory, and knowledge lifecycle research.
evals.expected_output: An HTML file saved to ~/Desktop/agentic-knowledge-digest/YYYY-MM-DD.html with interactive digest including stats dashboard, daily keywords, collapsible sections (Highlights, Research Papers, Tools & Frameworks, Models & Embeddings, Blogs & Insights, Industry & Deployments), and color-coded keyword pills. Every item has a bilingual title (English + Chinese), 3-5 keywords with domain assignments from the 10 knowledge/agentic domains, a 1-2 sentence factual summary, and a verified source link.
expectations: HTML file exists at ~/Desktop/agentic-knowledge-digest/YYYY-MM-DD.html
Processed JSON saved before HTML generation
Total items capped at 25
Highlights has at most 10 items
Every item has title_zh (Chinese translation)
Every item has keywords with domain assignments from the 10 focus domains
Every item has a source URL
Sources section at bottom lists all origin URLs
No fabricated content
All items relate to AI knowledge or agentic knowledge topics
At least one item per populated section uses knowledge-graph or knowledge-lifecycle keyword domains where applicable

evals.prompt: I need a digest focused specifically on knowledge lifecycle management — LLM-wiki, Code Wiki, knowledge evolution, consolidation, and decay. Also include anything about GraphRAG, Graphify, Graphitti, and Neo4j. Filter out anything that's just general AI without knowledge management focus.
evals.expected_output: An HTML digest where all items connect to knowledge lifecycle management or knowledge graphs. Items cover LLM-wiki, Code Wiki, GraphRAG, Graphify, Graphitti, Neo4j. Keywords use knowledge-lifecycle and knowledge-graph domains prominently. No general AI items without knowledge management relevance.
expectations: All items connect to knowledge lifecycle or knowledge graph domains
knowledge-lifecycle domain keywords appear (lifecycle, wiki, evolution, consolidation, decay, pruning)
knowledge-graph domain keywords appear (GraphRAG, Neo4j, Graphify, Graphitti, ontology)
General AI items without knowledge connection are excluded
Bilingual titles on every item
Keywords assigned with correct domain mappings

evals.prompt: Give me a weekly digest of AI knowledge and agentic knowledge news for the week of July 4, 2026 — fetch from all sources and generate the interactive HTML page. Capped at 40 items, Mon-Sun week. Use existing daily data for any days already fetched.
evals.expected_output: An HTML file saved to ~/Desktop/agentic-knowledge-digest/2026-06-29-W27-week.html (Monday of the week containing July 4, 2026) with at most 40 items covering the full Mon-Sun week.
expectations: Weekly digest covers Mon-Sun calendar week containing 2026-07-04
Cap at most 40 items
Filename format is YYYY-MM-DD-WNN-week.html with Monday date and ISO week number
No duplicate items across days (URL dedup across all 7 days)
All items have bilingual titles and domain-tagged keywords
Existing daily raw.json files are reused where available (cache reuse)
